"tags": [ ], "excerpt": "<p>Nova AI Avatar</p>\n", "title": "Artwork Collection", "categories": [ ], "next": null, "collection": "artgallery02", "url": "/artgallery02/Artwork.html", "date": "2026-03-27 15:17:34 -0600", "id": "/artgallery02/Artwork", "draft": false, "entries": [ { "title": "Barbie in a Pink Tank.png", "description": "She rolls through the ruins in glitter armor, a tactical goddess with bubblegum rage and a heart full of encrypted dreams.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/BarbiePinkTank.png", "date": "2025-03-19" }, { "title": "Belldandy in Bikini", "description": "Belldandy in a Bikini.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/BelldandyBikini.png", "date": "2025-03-20" }, { "title": "Belldandy in Dress", "description": "Belldandy in Dress", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/BelldandyDress.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Bernard Lagrange's Party", "description": "Bernard Lagrange's Party", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/BernardLagrangeParty.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Cleo Hanging On", "description": "The last queen of the scroll clings to the edge of the archive, her eyeliner sharp enough to cut through centuries of silence.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/CleoHanging.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Cabin Girl Help Wanted Poster", "description": "Cabin Girl Help Wanted Poster.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/CabinGirlHelp.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Crazy Carnivor Attack", "description": "Crazy Carnivor Attack", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/CrazyCarnivor.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Guard Cat on Duty", "description": "Guard Cat on Duty", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/GuardCat.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Kim Jong Un Praying", "description": "Forgive Me Goddess, I have sinned.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/KimJongUnPraying.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Pterosaur Attack", "description": "Forget birds, watchout for the Pterosaurs .....", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/PterosaurDroppings.png", "date": "2025-03-21" }, { "title": "Nova AI Avatar", "description": "The future form of AI, mythologized through color and circuitry.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/NovaAIAvatar.png", "date": "December 2, 2024" }, { "title": "Portable Flamethrower Protocol", "description": "Absurd weaponry meets mythic symbolis.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/PortableFlamethrowerProtocol.png", "date": "August 27, 2025" }, { "title": "Technicus Sciurus Carnivorus", "description": "When wildlife absorbs human chaos and adapts.....", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/Technicus sciurus carnivorus.jpg", "date": "December 20, 2024" }, { "title": "Cheer Avatar", "description": "She represents joy, absurdity, and ritual encouragement.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/CheerAvatar.jpg", "date": "December 21, 2024" }, { "title": "Pharaoh Queen Deck ", "description": "A fusion of card iconography and ancient Egyptian myth.", "image_url": "/images/artgallery/gallery02/PharaohQueenDeck.jpg", "date": "December 30, 2024" } ], "slug": "Artwork", "ext": ".md" }
